narrative.narrative: Bitcoin's 30-day momentum has collapsed into a sideways grind, dragging the Fear & Greed Index to a deeply fearful 33 as BTC dominance begins to fade. This exhaustion closely mirrors the August 2024 bottom, where a similar washout of speculative excess and risk appetite preceded a sharp mean-reversion rally. The market is purging the last of its impatient hands, setting the stage for a narrative shift as soon as the consolidation breaks.
